title: Ankr & Helio - REKT
relevance_summary: Exploit involving private key compromise and unauthorized minting of aBNBc tokens

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls a function with selector 0x3b3a5522

summary: The exploit involved a private key compromise leading to unauthorized minting of aBNBc tokens via a bypass of caller verification. A guard could have detected and blocked the exploit by monitoring for calls to the specific function selector used in the exploit.
